Motion To Petition For Stay Of Execution
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Janeva Chiang, Plaintiff and moving party
The Court question Janeva Chiang. Court having reviewed the pleadings, adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS JANEVA CHIANG, HERO CHIANG, and GREATWALLS CHIANG's Motion To Petition For Stay Of Execution is DENIED. The plaintiff failed to file a proof of service, in addition, the party also did not comply with the ex parte rules by failing to give notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Dept.501; Not Reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Form Interrogatories, Set One; And Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Sanctions As To All Plaintiffs
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Janet M. Brayer, Esq. of the Law Offices of Janet Bayer, Tel. 415.445.9555, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: At the request of the moving party, the Court modified its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT NADER HEYDAYIAN'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Form Interrogatories, Set One; And Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Sanctions As To All Plaintiffs. Defendant's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED. The remaining plaintiffs shall serve verified responses on or before April 18, 2014. Defendant's Request for sanctions is GRANTED as to all remaining plaintiffs in the amount of $1,340.00 which shall be paid by April 21, 2014. Should Plaintiffs' fail to comply with this, the action will be dismissed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
